{"tests":[{"filename":"001_short_help_usage.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/help.out"
err="$tmpdir/help.err"
if ! "$UTIL" -h >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo -h failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if ! grep -qi '^usage:' "$out"; then
  echo "help output did not contain usage" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-h displays help","expected":"stdout contains a usage line","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"002_long_help_usage.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/help.out"
err="$tmpdir/help.err"
if ! "$UTIL" --help >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo --help failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if ! grep -qi '^usage:' "$out"; then
  echo "long help output did not contain usage" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--help displays help","expected":"stdout contains a usage line","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"003_version_string.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/version.out"
err="$tmpdir/version.err"
if ! "$UTIL" -V >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo -V failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if ! grep -q 'Sudo version' "$out"; then
  echo "version output missing Sudo version" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-V prints version information","expected":"stdout contains Sudo version","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"004_reset_timestamp_no_command.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/reset.out"
err="$tmpdir/reset.err"
set +e
"$UTIL" -k >"$out" 2>"$err"
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -ne 0 ]]; then
  echo "sudo -k exited nonzero" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-k without command resets cached credentials","expected":"sudo -k exits successfully","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"005_remove_timestamp_no_command.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/remove.out"
err="$tmpdir/remove.err"
set +e
"$UTIL" -K >"$out" 2>"$err"
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -ne 0 ]]; then
  echo "sudo -K exited nonzero" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-K without command removes cached credentials","expected":"sudo -K exits successfully","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"006_validate_noninteractive.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/validate.out"
err="$tmpdir/validate.err"
set +e
"$UTIL" -n -v >"$out" 2>"$err"
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -ne 0 ]]; then
  echo "sudo -n -v exited nonzero" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-v validates credentials without running a command; -n avoids prompting","expected":"validation exits successfully","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"007_no_update_validate.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/no_update.out"
err="$tmpdir/no_update.err"
set +e
"$UTIL" -Nnv >"$out" 2>"$err"
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -ne 0 ]]; then
  echo "sudo -Nnv exited nonzero" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-N with -n -v does not update cached credentials","expected":"non-updating validation exits successfully","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"008_list_privileges.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/list.out"
err="$tmpdir/list.err"
set +e
"$UTIL" -n -l >"$out" 2>"$err"
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -ne 0 ]]; then
  echo "sudo -n -l exited nonzero" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-l lists privileges without a command","expected":"privilege listing exits successfully","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"009_command_exit_status.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/cmd.out"
err="$tmpdir/cmd.err"
set +e
"$UTIL" -n /bin/sh -c 'exit 7' >"$out" 2>"$err"
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -ne 7 ]]; then
  echo "sudo did not propagate command exit status" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"command execution exit value","expected":"sudo exits with the executed program status","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"010_command_stdout.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/stdout.out"
err="$tmpdir/stdout.err"
if ! "$UTIL" -n /bin/printf 'hello\n' >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo command execution failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if [[ "$(cat "$out")" != "hello" ]]; then
  echo "command stdout was not preserved" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"basic command execution","expected":"executed command writes expected stdout","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"011_end_of_options.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
cmd="$tmpdir/record_arg"
out="$tmpdir/arg.out"
err="$tmpdir/arg.err"
cat >"$cmd" <<'EOS'
#!/bin/sh
printf '%s\n' "$1" > "$2"
EOS
chmod +x "$cmd"
if ! "$UTIL" -n -- "$cmd" -n "$out" >"$tmpdir/stdout.out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo -- command failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if [[ "$(cat "$out")" != "-n" ]]; then
  echo "argument after -- was not passed to command" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-- delimits sudo options","expected":"option-looking argument after -- reaches command","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"012_chdir_directory.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
work="$tmpdir/work"
mkdir "$work"
out="$tmpdir/pwd.out"
err="$tmpdir/pwd.err"
if ! "$UTIL" -n -D "$work" /bin/pwd >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo -D command failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if [[ "$(cat "$out")" != "$work" ]]; then
  echo "command did not run in requested directory" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-D runs command in specified directory","expected":"pwd output equals requested directory","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"013_user_numeric_uid.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
uid=$(/usr/bin/id -u)
out="$tmpdir/id.out"
err="$tmpdir/id.err"
if ! "$UTIL" -n -u "#$uid" /usr/bin/id -u >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo -u numeric uid command failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if [[ "$(cat "$out")" != "$uid" ]]; then
  echo "command did not run as requested uid" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-u accepts numeric UID prefixed with #","expected":"id -u reports the requested UID","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"014_group_numeric_gid.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
gid=$(/usr/bin/id -g)
out="$tmpdir/id.out"
err="$tmpdir/id.err"
if ! "$UTIL" -n -g "#$gid" /usr/bin/id -g >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo -g numeric gid command failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if [[ "$(cat "$out")" != "$gid" ]]; then
  echo "command did not run with requested primary gid" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-g accepts numeric GID prefixed with #","expected":"id -g reports the requested GID","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"015_preserve_groups.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
expected=$(/usr/bin/id -G)
out="$tmpdir/groups.out"
err="$tmpdir/groups.err"
if ! "$UTIL" -n -P /usr/bin/id -G >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo -P command failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if [[ "$(cat "$out")" != "$expected" ]]; then
  echo "supplementary groups were not preserved" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-P preserves invoking user's group vector","expected":"id -G output matches invoking user's groups","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"016_background_command.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/background.out"
err="$tmpdir/background.err"
cmd="sleep 1; printf 'done' > '$out'"
if ! "$UTIL" -n -b /bin/sh -c "$cmd" >"$tmpdir/sudo.out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo -b failed to start command" >&2
  exit 1
fi
for _ in {1..50}; do
  [[ -f "$out" ]] && break
  sleep 0.1
done
if [[ "$(cat "$out" 2>/dev/null || true)" != "done" ]]; then
  echo "background command did not complete expected work" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-b runs command in the background","expected":"background command creates expected output file","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"017_shell_option_uses_shell_env.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
shell="$tmpdir/fakeshell"
marker="$tmpdir/shell_used"
out="$tmpdir/shell.out"
err="$tmpdir/shell.err"
cat >"$shell" <<EOF
#!/bin/sh
printf 'used' > "$marker"
exit 0
EOF
chmod +x "$shell"
if ! SHELL="$shell" "$UTIL" -n -s ignored >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo -s command failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if [[ "$(cat "$marker" 2>/dev/null || true)" != "used" ]]; then
  echo "SHELL program was not used by -s" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-s uses the SHELL environment variable when set","expected":"configured shell program is invoked","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"018_login_option_runs_command.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/login.out"
err="$tmpdir/login.err"
if ! "$UTIL" -n -i /usr/bin/printf 'login-ok\n' >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo -i command failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if ! grep -qx 'login-ok' "$out"; then
  echo "login shell command output missing" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-i runs a command via the target user's login shell","expected":"specified command output is produced","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"019_set_home.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
home=$(getent passwd root | awk -F: '{print $6}')
out="$tmpdir/env.out"
err="$tmpdir/env.err"
if ! "$UTIL" -n -H /usr/bin/env >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo -H env failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if ! grep -qx "HOME=$home" "$out"; then
  echo "HOME was not set to target user's home" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-H requests HOME be set to target user's home directory","expected":"command environment contains root's HOME","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"020_preserve_env_all.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/env.out"
err="$tmpdir/env.err"
if ! SUDO_TEST_PRESERVE_ALL=kept "$UTIL" -n -E /usr/bin/env >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo -E env failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if ! grep -qx 'SUDO_TEST_PRESERVE_ALL=kept' "$out"; then
  echo "environment variable was not preserved by -E" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-E preserves existing environment variables","expected":"chosen environment variable is present in command environment","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"021_preserve_env_list.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/env.out"
err="$tmpdir/env.err"
if ! SUDO_TEST_PRESERVE_LIST=listed "$UTIL" -n --preserve-env=SUDO_TEST_PRESERVE_LIST /usr/bin/env >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo --preserve-env=list failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if ! grep -qx 'SUDO_TEST_PRESERVE_LIST=listed' "$out"; then
  echo "listed environment variable was not preserved" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"--preserve-env=list preserves named variables","expected":"named variable is present in command environment","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"022_environment_assignment.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/env.out"
err="$tmpdir/env.err"
if ! "$UTIL" -n SUDO_TEST_ASSIGNMENT=assigned /usr/bin/env >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo VAR=value command failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if ! grep -qx 'SUDO_TEST_ASSIGNMENT=assigned' "$out"; then
  echo "environment assignment was not passed to command" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"VAR=value environment assignment before command","expected":"assigned variable is present in command environment","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"023_sudoedit_creates_file.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
editor="$tmpdir/editor"
target="$tmpdir/newfile.txt"
out="$tmpdir/edit.out"
err="$tmpdir/edit.err"
cat >"$editor" <<'EOS'
#!/bin/sh
printf 'edited\n' > "$1"
exit 0
EOS
chmod +x "$editor"
if ! SUDO_EDITOR="$editor" "$UTIL" -n -e "$target" >"$out" 2>"$err"; then
  echo "sudo -e failed to create file" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if [[ "$(cat "$target" 2>/dev/null || true)" != "edited" ]]; then
  echo "sudoedit did not install edited content" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-e/sudoedit creates a specified file that does not exist","expected":"target file contains editor's content","expected_to_fail":false},{"filename":"024_remove_timestamp_with_command_error.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/remove_cmd.out"
err="$tmpdir/remove_cmd.err"
set +e
"$UTIL" -K /bin/true >"$out" 2>"$err"
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -eq 0 ]]; then
  echo "sudo -K with a command unexpectedly succeeded" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-K may not be used with a command","expected":"sudo exits nonzero","expected_to_fail":true},{"filename":"025_close_from_too_small_error.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/closefrom.out"
err="$tmpdir/closefrom.err"
set +e
"$UTIL" -C 2 /bin/true >"$out" 2>"$err"
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -eq 0 ]]; then
  echo "sudo -C 2 unexpectedly succeeded" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"-C values less than three are not permitted","expected":"sudo exits nonzero","expected_to_fail":true},{"filename":"026_duplicate_user_option_error.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/dup_user.out"
err="$tmpdir/dup_user.err"
set +e
"$UTIL" -u root -u root /bin/true >"$out" 2>"$err"
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -eq 0 ]]; then
  echo "duplicate -u options unexpectedly succeeded" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"options taking a value may only be specified once","expected":"duplicate -u causes nonzero exit","expected_to_fail":true},{"filename":"027_duplicate_chdir_option_error.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
work="$tmpdir/work"
mkdir "$work"
out="$tmpdir/dup_chdir.out"
err="$tmpdir/dup_chdir.err"
set +e
"$UTIL" -D "$work" -D "$work" /bin/pwd >"$out" 2>"$err"
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -eq 0 ]]; then
  echo "duplicate -D options unexpectedly succeeded" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"options taking a value may only be specified once","expected":"duplicate -D causes nonzero exit","expected_to_fail":true},{"filename":"028_invalid_preserve_env_name_error.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
out="$tmpdir/bad_env.out"
err="$tmpdir/bad_env.err"
set +e
"$UTIL" --preserve-env=BAD=NAME -n /bin/true >"$out" 2>"$err"
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -eq 0 ]]; then
  echo "invalid preserve-env name unexpectedly succeeded" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"invalid environment variable name in -E/--preserve-env list","expected":"sudo exits nonzero","expected_to_fail":true},{"filename":"029_sudoedit_env_assignment_error.sh","body":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
target="$tmpdir/file.txt"
out="$tmpdir/edit_env.out"
err="$tmpdir/edit_env.err"
set +e
"$UTIL" -n -e SUDO_EDIT_FORBIDDEN=value "$target" >"$out" 2>"$err"
status=$?
set -e
if [[ $status -eq 0 ]]; then
  echo "environment assignment in edit mode unexpectedly succeeded" >&2
  exit 1
fi
","exercises":"environment variables may not be specified in edit mode","expected":"sudoedit exits nonzero","expected_to_fail":true}]}
